headline: AI for Intellectual Property: Patent Search, Prior Art Analysis, and Trademark Intelligence
description: AI is transforming intellectual property law -- from semantic patent search that finds prior art keyword systems miss to LLM-assisted patent drafting to trademark availability screening. The 150M+ global patent corpus is too vast for manual analysis; AI-powered IP tools are becoming essential for patent examiners, attorneys, and R&D strategists.

citation.name: Advancing patent law with generative AI: Human-in-the-loop frameworks for patent drafting and prior art
AI-Powered Prior Art Search: Towards Enriching Intellectual Property Systems
